summary: Verified text color fixes on Contact and Careers forms. Careers page fully fixed (all inputs white, dropdown options styled with dark bg + white text, colorScheme:dark applied). Contact form fix is INCOMPLETE: 'company' input and 'message' textarea still render text in near-black (rgb(10,10,10)) on the dark background because the text-white/placeholder classes were only added to name and email fields.
passed: Contact form: name input text color = rgb(255,255,255) (white)
Contact form: email input text color = rgb(255,255,255) (white)
Careers form: name/email/portfolio/message inputs all render white text on dark bg
Careers form: position select renders white text
Careers form: 19 options + 3 optgroups all have inline backgroundColor #1f2937/#111827 and color #fff
Careers form: select has style.colorScheme = 'dark' (native dark popup on supporting browsers)
Both pages load successfully via public URL

failed.issue: Typed text is invisible (near-black rgb(10,10,10) on dark bg). Missing text-white and placeholder:text-gray-400 classes.
failed.evidence: /app/frontend/src/components/Contact.jsx line 132: className="bg-black/50 border-gray-700 focus:border-white transition-colors" (no text-white). Playwright getComputedStyle(#company).color returned rgb(10, 10, 10). Screenshot confirms 'Acme Co' text is not visible in the field.

failed.issue: Typed text is invisible (near-black rgb(10,10,10) on dark bg). Missing text-white and placeholder:text-gray-400 classes.
failed.evidence: /app/frontend/src/components/Contact.jsx line 148: className="bg-black/50 border-gray-700 focus:border-white transition-colors resize-none" (no text-white). Playwright getComputedStyle(#message).color returned rgb(10, 10, 10). Screenshot confirms typed message text is not visible.

action_items: In /app/frontend/src/components/Contact.jsx, add 'text-white placeholder:text-gray-400' to the className of the Company Input (line 132) and Message Textarea (line 148), matching what was already done for name/email fields.

After fix, re-verify by typing in both Company and Message fields on the Ripple VFX contact section AND on the Ripple Digital variant (if a separate ContactDigital component exists — check by clicking 'Ripple Digital' toggle in header).

success_rate.frontend: ~85% (13/15 checks passed; 2 Contact form fields still broken)
